hero.question: Will Bitcoin dip to $45,000 by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: The crowd is genuinely split at 46.5%, which means either Bitcoin holders are underestimating tail risk or bears are pricing in a correction that won't materialize, and you're getting paid nearly even money for a 2-year bet on one of the most volatile assets ever created. Watch the macro setup in Q4 2025, because if we're not in a recession and tech stays bid, $45K looks like a sucker's bet at these odds.

daily_take.headline: Bitcoin's $45K Floor Looks Safer Than the Market Thinks
daily_take.deck: Bitcoin dipped 10 points overnight as macro headwinds spooked retail. But 46.5% odds on a $45K crash by EOY 2026 prices in zero volatility and ignores the structural bid from institutions now holding 5-10% of all supply. The sharp play: take the under. Smart money doesn't bet on capitulation when it's already priced in.
